languages.text: {n}Себериан кивает.{/n} "Вы верный слуга династии, и я этого не забуду".

traits.locale_text: "Разумно. Ваш дар убеждения, несомненно, хорош, но здесь и сейчас его недостаточно, {name}".

languages.text: {n}Seberian nods.{/n} "You are a loyal servant to the dynasty, and I will not forget that."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安点了点头。{/n}“你是王朝的忠仆，我不会忘记这一点。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods.{/n} "You are a loyal servant to the dynasty, and I will not forget that."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安点了点头。{/n}“你是王朝的忠仆，我不会忘记这一点。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian hoche la tête.{/n} « Vous êtes {mf|un fidèle serviteur|une fidèle servante} de la dynastie ; je ne l'oublierai pas. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods.{/n} "You are a loyal servant to the dynasty, and I will not forget that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hoche la tête.{/n} « Vous êtes {mf|un fidèle serviteur|une fidèle servante} de la dynastie ; je ne l'oublierai pas. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian asiente.{/n} «Sirve fielmente a la dinastía. No lo olvidaré».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods.{/n} "You are a loyal servant to the dynasty, and I will not forget that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian asiente.{/n} «Sirve fielmente a la dinastía. No lo olvidaré».

languages.text: {n}Seberian başını sallıyor.{/n} "Hanedanlığa sadık bir hizmetkârsın. Bunu unutmayacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods.{/n} "You are a loyal servant to the dynasty, and I will not forget that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian başını sallıyor.{/n} "Hanedanlığa sadık bir hizmetkârsın. Bunu unutmayacağım."

languages.text: {n}Seberian nickt.{/n} "Ihr seid meiner Dynastie treu ergeben. Das werde ich niemals vergessen."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods.{/n} "You are a loyal servant to the dynasty, and I will not forget that."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian nickt.{/n} "Ihr seid meiner Dynastie treu ergeben. Das werde ich niemals vergessen."

languages.text:
{n}セベリアンの頷き。{/n}
「あなたは王朝に忠実な臣下です。私はそれを忘れません。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods.{/n} "You are a loyal servant to the dynasty, and I will not forget that."
